_fallback_chain: On a usage/rate limit, runs cascade: claude -> kimi -> openai/chatgpt -> qwen -> fallback (DeepSeek/GLM). ChatGPT is REST-only so write jobs skip it. Tutor jobs use Gemini first, then kimi -> openai -> qwen -> fallback. Leave a block's apiKey empty to skip it.

kimi._comment: Kimi (Moonshot) Anthropic-compatible endpoint — 1st fallback. Unlike DashScope, Moonshot honours the model field, so set a real Kimi model id.

openai._comment: OpenAI / ChatGPT REST fallback for read-only AI features.

gemini._comment: Google AI Studio key — 2nd fallback (REST-only: read-only chats + add-to-note, not write jobs). Free key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey.

qwen._comment: Qwen DashScope Claude Code proxy. Anthropic-compatible, but currently flaky for some accounts.

fallback._comment: DeepSeek/GLM Anthropic-compatible endpoint — 3rd fallback. Leave apiKey empty to disable.
